phase4Plan.strategyNote: UPDATE journal_entry_lines.account_id from control 1100 to party AR-* when the linked sale document JE debited the party sub-ledger. Matches RAEES LHR repair (2026-06-16).

phases.name: Missing sale revenue JE repair
phases.description: Post Dr AR / Cr Sales Revenue 4100 for imported final sales with no canonical document JE.
gates: No duplicate active document JE for same sale

phases.name: Missing COGS / Inventory relief repair
phases.description: Append Dr COGS 5010 / Cr Inventory 1200 on sale document JEs when cost source is reliable.
gates: Product cost from weighted avg or cost_price — never sale price
Stock movement qty must match sale item qty

phases.name: Purchase total / inventory mismatch repair
phases.description: Adjust stale ERP purchase total (67,978,418.40) vs updated CSV (67,514,347.40).
gates: Never auto-update purchase header without approved migration
phases.note: Manual approval required — adjust purchase header total via approved migration only

phases.name: AR payment party reclass (1100 → AR-*)
phases.description: Relink sale receipt AR credits from control 1100 to customer party sub-ledger when the sale document JE debited AR-*.
gates: Only moves AR credit lines on payment JEs (no sale total / payment amount changes)
phases.note: UPDATE journal_entry_lines.account_id from control 1100 to party AR-* when the linked sale document JE debited the party sub-ledger. Matches RAEES LHR repair (2026-06-16).

phases.name: Owner Equity Opening Clearing review
phases.description: Analysis only — FS2 routing / opening equity clearing; no apply unless separately approved.
gates: User must explicitly approve separate owner-equity repair

phases.name: Legacy sell return import + GL
phases.description: Import 4 excluded sell_return documents (CN2025/0001–0002, CN2026/0003–0004) with settlement Dr 4100 / Cr AR and inventory reversal.
phases.note: Not applied automatically — reduces AR gap by ~Rs 1,059,903 when posted.

phases.name: Screenshot discount backfill (sales + GL)
phases.description: Backfill old-ERP Customers & Suppliers screenshot discounts on DC-0041, DC-0004, DC-0002 — UPDATE sales.discount_amount/total/due and amend document JE (Dr AR net, Cr 4100 gross, Dr 5200).
phases.note: Screenshot backfill: UPDATE sales.discount_amount/total/due, then amend document JE — reduce Dr AR, increase Cr 4100, add Dr 5200.

phases.name: Discount GL alignment (Dr 5200 / gross 4100)
phases.description: Amend sale document JEs for legacy sales with discount_amount > 0 — increase Cr 4100, add Dr Discount Allowed 5200.
phases.note: Phase 7 amends document JE: Cr 4100 gross, Dr AR net, Dr 5200 discount. Phase 7.5 handles screenshot-only discounts.

proposedRepairs.note: Manual approval required — adjust purchase header total via approved migration only
